name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed financial reporting causes cash flow gaps. We generate automated monthly financial reports instead of manual spreadsheets or basic accounting software.
problem_solved: Etsy sellers need to generate accurate monthly financial reports to manage their cash flow effectively.
